description: DID-bound succession record. Charter §1.12 state-function routing-around for inheritance: SBT + wallet handover from decedent to heir(s), with Council ≥3 attestation. Pairs with funeral covenantAttestation. Wallet handover handled via gas-sponsored ERC-4337 paymaster transition; Land Registry inalienability invariant cross-checked (donated land never devolves to heirs — stays with religious-corp Land Trust per ADR-2605192245).

decedentWillCid.description: Optional. On-chain or encrypted off-chain will document CID (per ADR-2605181100 envelope if encrypted).

landRegistryInalienabilityVerifiedCid.description: Cross-check that any donated-land registry entries associated with decedent remain with Land Trust (waqf-equivalent invariant per ADR-2605192245); inheritance NEVER conveys donated land.

heirDids.description: DID(s) of heir(s). Multi-heir splits permitted; per-heir wallet share specified in heirAllocations[].

decedentSbtBurnTxCid.description: On-chain Adherent SBT burn transaction CID for the decedent.

heirAllocations.description: Per-heir allocation. Sum of walletShare across all heirs MUST equal 1.

shidemoriMemorialCid.description: When shidemori actor is live (R2+), the memorial NFT CID.

walletHandoverTxCids.description: ERC-4337 paymaster-sponsored handover transaction CIDs (gas paid from Public Fund per Council Lv6+ standing approval for inheritance flow).

funeralCovenantAttestationCid.description: CID of the covenantAttestation record with ceremonyType=funeral. Required link.

councilAttestations.description: ≥3 Council seat DIDs attesting the succession event.

attestingDid.description: DID of Council seat or executor emitting this record.
